text: A jar contains 10 sweets. 5 of them are strawberry flavoured. What fraction of the sweets are strawberry?
generatorSolution: There are 5 strawberry sweets out of 10 sweets in total. As a fraction, this is 5/10. We simplify by dividing both the numerator and denominator by 5: 5 ÷ 5 = 1 and 10 ÷ 5 = 2. So the fraction is 1/2.
